title: habenaria radiata
intro: Habenaria radiata, also known as the Radiate Habenaria or Yellow Fringed Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Habenaria radiata include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as a decoction or a paste, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
